title.zh: 技术负责人 · 软件架构师

location.zh: 中国上海 · 可远程协作

availability.zh: 接受精选的架构与产品合作
availability.en: Open to selected architecture and product engagements

summary.zh:
拥有超过 15 年的软件开发经验，专注于把复杂业务需求转化为可靠、可演进的软件系统。作为技术负责人，我同时关注架构质量、交付节奏与团队成长。

我带领团队交付的网站和微信小程序可稳定支撑每秒超过 3,000 次并发请求；在电商、内容平台与企业系统领域，持续以测试、CI/CD 和安全实践保证产品长期可维护。
summary.en:
With over 15 years in software development, I turn complex business requirements into reliable, evolvable systems. As a technical lead, I balance architecture quality, delivery momentum, and team growth.

My teams have delivered web and WeChat products that reliably handle more than 3,000 concurrent requests per second, with testing, CI/CD, and security practices built into the delivery process.
